title: Dry eye follow-up
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

investigations.text: Supports dry-eye symptom screening, visual symptoms, tear-film tests, fluorescein or lissamine staining, and cornea, conjunctiva, or eyelid-margin observation without inferring diagnosis from symptoms alone.
investigations.rationale: Supports symptom screening, tear-film tests, staining and surface observation for dry-eye follow-up; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports dry-eye symptom screening, visual symptoms, tear-film tests, fluorescein or lissamine staining, and cornea, conjunctiva, or eyelid-margin observation without inferring diagnosis from symptoms alone.

source.title: TFOS DEWS II Diagnostic Methodology report

exact_section.heading: Clinical protocol for the dry-eye diagnostic test battery

investigations.text: Supports screen-related visual discomfort, pain or photophobia as differential context, and contact-lens-associated dry-eye context without treatment instructions.
investigations.rationale: Supports differential and contact-lens context for dry-eye follow-up; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports screen-related visual discomfort, pain or photophobia as differential context, and contact-lens-associated dry-eye context without treatment instructions.

source.title: TFOS DEWS II Diagnostic Methodology report

exact_section.heading: Differential diagnosis, visual asthenopia, and contact lenses

follow_up.text: Supports clinician-observed corneal, conjunctival, eyelid, and fluorescein-staining documentation in dry-eye evaluation.
follow_up.rationale: Supports corneal, conjunctival and eyelid observation for dry-eye follow-up; no decision is generated.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-observed corneal, conjunctival, eyelid, and fluorescein-staining documentation in dry-eye evaluation.

source.title: TFOS DEWS II Diagnostic Methodology report

exact_section.heading: Ocular-surface damage and eyelid assessment
exact_section.locator: Sections 6.6 and 6.8; official report lines 327–365 and 402–463

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Symptoms, severity, triggers, screen and lens use, medicines, systemic context, tear tests, staining, diagnosis, treatment and response are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for dry-eye follow-up.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
